eligible_applicant_type: member of a Rhode Island botanical or environmental association
student in a field related to botany or environmental studies
geographic_restrictions: Rhode Island residents or students at a Rhode Island educational institution (excludes non-Rhode Island students from residency requirement)
project_area: preserving and protecting native plants and their habitats, including gardens, invasive removal, community outreach, project materials, workshops, or courses
demographic_requirements: Rhode Island residency required (except for students at Rhode Island educational institutions)
eligibility_summary: Open to educators, members of Rhode Island botanical/environmental associations, or students in botany/environmental studies fields. Projects must involve native plants/habitats and have a community outreach component. Rhode Island residency required unless applicant is a student at a Rhode Island educational institution.
